figures.caption: Fig. 3: Reward versus CPU allocation for RL-Loop. The reward is highest at intermediate CPU levels, where allocation best matches the normalized load estimate.
Fig. 2: 5G testbed used for RL-Loop experiments
Fig. 1: RL-Loop closed feedback loop in the 5G testbed. The RL agent receives KPIs as state and sends CPU limit update actions directly to the testbed every second.
